title: AVENUES TO COLLEGE - 211info
text: NEW AVENUES COLUMBIA STREET AVENUES TO COLLEGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps students, through one-on-one coaching, explore college options, apply, and get support after enrolling. Also provides financial assistance for housing and living expenses, budgeting guidance and scholarships, and information about other available resources. 1220 SW Columbia Street Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Must have 180 days of placement service after the age of 14 Ages 16-24 Must have a current or family-of-origin address within the City of Portland Hours: Application deadline is last day of May Email (503) 206-1666 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 206-1666 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website, call, or email for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: City of Portland TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located on the lower level of the building. Use the side door next to the parking lot and press the buzzer to enter. Services: College/University Entrance Support * Former Foster Children College/University Entrance Support * Foster Children Institutional Scholarship Funds * Former Foster Children Institutional Scholarship Funds * Foster Children Specialized Information and Referral * College/University Students * Former Foster Children Specialized Information and Referral * College/University Students * Foster Children Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - SMYRC RESOURCE CENTER HOUSING/SHELTER - TRANSITIONAL HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
